the back with Demar and they wouldn't quite get back on again after that point we were watching this group Jasper Phillips and Olaf koi two very fast finishes and what could fresh pre-sawn do free song opened up first and then it was uh Eve Lampard to try and go over the top of him evil empire led into the final sweeping Ben but Jasper Phillipson absolutely Unstoppable come the line despite the what remains of such an attritional race at the bruga de Pana classic it really was a classic not quite the Winds of 2020 when Eve Lampard was the winner on that occasion but strong wins lashing rain all day and tough attritional conditions Jasper Phillipson with the win ahead of olafcoy Eve Lampard getting on the podium thankfully for him and his team and Fred frison in fourth place after that fast men up and coming after his parineese stage win too I do hope you enjoyed it I really enjoyed bringing it to you don't forget you can catch it all the way back on the gcn app
